name: Encore LB15IP

importPlugin.comment: GDTF v1.2 fixture type ID: D91273EB-DC07-4B93-A73E-24F395EE363F

comment: Offering a tough metal construction and IP65 ‘weatherproof’ rating, the Encore LB15IP is a linear LED wash fixture designed for rental, event production and concert production applications. It features 15 x 20-Watt quad color RGBL (Red, Green, Blue and Lime) LEDs which offer a huge variety of color options, including white light with a variable color temperature of 2700K to 7000K, and a high CRI. Each of the LEDs can be controlled independently and has a tight beam angle of 11-degrees with the option to change the beam to 25-degrees with the supplied frost filter.

capabilities.comment: Random Strobe Effect Slow to Fast

Each of the LEDs can be controlled independently and has a tight beam angle of 11-degrees with the option to change the beam to 25-degrees with the supplied frost filter.
